name: patient-roster-table
title: Patient Roster Table
description: A multi-patient census / queue as a panel — acuity-sorted rows of patients. Composes WidgetPanel + TriageQueueRow.

props.name: patients
props.description: Roster rows; each is a TriageQueueRow's props (+ optional id).

props.name: byAcuity
props.description: Sort by triage level (1 first), then longest wait.

clinicalNotes: Roster ordering is a safety decision: the highest-acuity patient must sort to the top regardless of arrival order, with wait time breaking ties against per-level targets (carried by TriageQueueRow). This is the census/worklist a clinician scans first each shift — keep the row legible at wallboard distance and let the acuity color and wait chip do the triage.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Provider and Triage/ED blocks (B-2, B-4).
